description: Audits hieradata keys in the control-repo environment layer. Reads the environment-level hiera.yaml to locate all declared data directories, then parses every YAML file found under those directories. For each top-level hiera key, reports how many files it appears in and which files contain it — sorted from least popular (fewest files, default) to most popular, or the inverse. Module-level hiera data is excluded. No Puppet Server or PuppetDB connection is required.

environment.description: Puppet environment to analyse. Defaults to 'production'.

env_dir.description: Absolute path to the environment directory on the Primary Server. Defaults to the path derived from `puppet config print environmentpath` and the environment parameter (e.g. /etc/puppetlabs/code/environments/production).

sort.description: Sort order for results. 'asc' (default) lists least-referenced keys first — the most likely staleness candidates. 'desc' lists most-referenced keys first.
